text: NASA recently confirmed that a massive asteroid will collide with Earth in September 2026, causing total extinction.
notes: Classic viral hoax. No such asteroid exists.

text: The Earth is roughly 93 million miles away from the Sun on average.
During the COVID-19 pandemic, some countries temporarily restricted travel to limit the spread of the virus.
A new study reveals that drinking ten cups of coffee a day makes humans completely immune to all types of cancer.
Drinking water in moderate quantities is vital for human hydration and metabolic functions.
